title: Functional Piping & Composition
description: Implement functional piping and composition with Result types to chain asynchronous operations. Utilize libraries like `neverthrow` or `fp-ts` to maintain type-safe error paths throughout application logic.
objectives: Implement functional piping and composition with Result types to chain asynchronous operations.
Utilize libraries like `neverthrow` or `fp-ts` to maintain type-safe error paths throughout application logic.

content.title: Error Rates with Functional Piping vs Imperative
content.description: Visualizing how error propagation using Result types decreases unhandled exceptions as codebase size grows.
